entries.description: Read Set 019 change-log (just-shipped uatStyle split). Read gate_checks.py (5 gate functions). Listed extension source structure (commands, dashboard, providers). Confirmed router-config.yaml forced_model overrides and max_tier behavior for Gemini routing.

Authored spec.md with 10-bucket audit surface, scoring criteria, dual-verifier routing plan (GPT-5.4 via session-verification + Gemini Pro via analysis/max_tier=2), single-session scope, cost projection $0.35-$1.00. Operator approved.

Authored ai-assignment.md confirming routing plan: GPT-5.4 via task_type=session-verification (config-forced), Gemini Pro via task_type=analysis max_tier=2 (tier-2 clamp). Three open decisions resolved by operator (all recommendations accepted).

Authored audit-inventory.md with 10 buckets (A-J): per-bucket structural summary, key flags/modes, line counts, dependency relationships, three-consumer fit notes. Cross-bucket dependency table included. Operator reviewed and approved before routing.

Authored verifier-prompt-template.md as a record of the prompt structure (context + philosophy + full inventory + 6 targeted excerpts + scoring schema with JSON response format). The routing script constructs the actual prompt inline.

Routed to GPT-5.4 via task_type=session-verification, complexity_hint=85. Prompt 35,232 chars. RouteResult dumped to JSON before attribute access per memory-feedback rule. Response: overall_complexity_score=7; 10 buckets scored with cuts and defenses. Saved to provider-responses/gpt-5-4-cuts.md.

Routed to Gemini 2.5 Pro via task_type=analysis, max_tier=2, complexity_hint=80. Confirmed model_name=gemini-pro (gemini-2.5-pro) — correct model landed. Prompt 31,329 chars. Response: overall_complexity_score=7; 10 buckets scored. Saved to provider-responses/gemini-2-5-pro-cuts.md.

Compared both verifier passes. Both scored 7/10. Per-bucket classification: 9 high-confidence cuts (both verifiers agreed), 3 split-opinion items (SO-1 ad-hoc UAT, SO-2 reason codes, SO-3 memory pruning), 14 items defended-as-load-bearing by both. No material philosophical divergence. Tiebreaker route not needed (saved $0.10-$0.20 vs. projection).

Authored simplification-proposal.md with five sections: 9 HC cuts (with concrete next-steps and risk ratings), 3 SO items (with both verifier quotes, orchestrator read, and operator flags), 14 defended-as-load-bearing items (table format), 5 deferred items, 3-session Set 021 implementation roadmap. Total cost $0.2337, within $0.35-$1.00 projection.
Authored change-log.md, disposition.json, this activity-log.json, session-state.json. Staged all session-1 artifacts. Committed. Pushed. Ran close_session.
